message:
feat(storage): tick 175 workflow + action-plan writes route through send_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Extends the tick-175 cx-first rollout (see b776928b) to the workflow
write cluster. Same mechanical transform as the prior tick-175 commit:
the _with_cx wrappers were pre-flight-checkpointing and then delegating
to the non-cx siblings, bypassing cx-aware backpressure on the mpsc
enqueue. This commit inlines the body so the WriteCommand is enqueued
via `send_with_cx(cx, …)` instead of `.send(…)`.

Wrappers converted:
- upsert_workflow_with_cx — per the existing doc comment this is the
  second most-called business mutation after upsert_pane, with 18+
  call sites. Biggest single-callsite win in this sub-cluster.
- upsert_action_plan_with_cx — converted alongside workflow upsert
  because action-plan writes ride the same workflow-control path. The
  plan is canonicalized up front via `action_plan_record_from_plan`
  so the writer thread receives a pre-validated record and doesn't
  re-do the work under the writer lock.

No schema, behavior, or public-API changes; feature-gated on
`asupersync-runtime` as before.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
